title: Operationalize revised v2.3-to-v3.0 roadmap into tracked release work
description: Convert the revised AOF 2.3 to 3.0 roadmap into executable release work packages, runtime-backed checkpoints, and explicit bridge-release gates without regressing the v2.2 capability baseline.
triage_notes: Restored to done after alignment-pulse exposed task lifecycle duplication behavior. Canonical state should remain done.
